diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Coroutines/CoroSplit.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Coroutines/CoroSplit.cpp
index dc3829d7f28e..32c6698c4544 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Coroutines/CoroSplit.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Coroutines/CoroSplit.cpp
@@ -2211,6 +2211,11 @@ PreservedAnalyses CoroSplitPass::run(LazyCallGraph::SCC &C,
     coro::Shape Shape =
         splitCoroutine(F, Clones, FAM.getResult<TargetIRAnalysis>(F),
                        OptimizeFrame, MaterializableCallback);
+    // After splitting, the function's body is different. Tell the call graph
+    // that the edges may have changed. This is where a recursive call that
+    // formed the SCC might have been removed.
+    CG.updateNodeAfterFunctionChange(*N);
+
     updateCallGraphAfterCoroutineSplit(*N, Shape, Clones, C, CG, AM, UR, FAM);
 
     auto &ORE = FAM.getResult<OptimizationRemarkEmitterAnalysis>(F);
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Coroutines/CoroSplit.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Coroutines/CoroSplit.cpp
index dc3829d7f28e..e73b7a4a3e08 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Coroutines/CoroSplit.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Coroutines/CoroSplit.cpp
@@ -2211,6 +2211,17 @@ PreservedAnalyses CoroSplitPass::run(LazyCallGraph::SCC &C,
     coro::Shape Shape =
         splitCoroutine(F, Clones, FAM.getResult<TargetIRAnalysis>(F),
                        OptimizeFrame, MaterializableCallback);
+    // After splitting, the function's body is different. Tell the call graph
+    // that the edges may have changed. This is where a recursive call that
+    // formed the SCC might have been removed.
+    CG.updateNodeAfterFunctionChange(*N);
+
+    // After splitting, the function's body is different. Tell the call graph
+    // that the edges may have changed. This is where a recursive call that
+    // formed the SCC might have been removed.
+    N->clear();
+    N->populate();
+
     updateCallGraphAfterCoroutineSplit(*N, Shape, Clones, C, CG, AM, UR, FAM);
 
     auto &ORE = FAM.getResult<OptimizationRemarkEmitterAnalysis>(F);
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Coroutines/CoroSplit.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Coroutines/CoroSplit.cpp
index dc3829d7f28e..23317b837479 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/Coroutines/CoroSplit.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/Coroutines/CoroSplit.cpp
@@ -2211,6 +2211,13 @@ PreservedAnalyses CoroSplitPass::run(LazyCallGraph::SCC &C,
     coro::Shape Shape =
         splitCoroutine(F, Clones, FAM.getResult<TargetIRAnalysis>(F),
                        OptimizeFrame, MaterializableCallback);
+    // After splitting, the function's body is different. We need to update the
+    // call graph to reflect changes to the call sites inside the function.
+    // This may have broken a recursive cycle, and thus the SCC. We need to
+    // update the CGSCC pass manager now, as it will otherwise complain that we
+    // invalidated the SCC that the pass is currently running on.
+    updateCGAndAnalysisManagerForFunctionPass(CG, C, *N, AM, UR, FAM);
+
     updateCallGraphAfterCoroutineSplit(*N, Shape, Clones, C, CG, AM, UR, FAM);
 
     auto &ORE = FAM.getResult<OptimizationRemarkEmitterAnalysis>(F);
